channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260423)
item.description:
What's New

fix(engine): resolve qww standalone undo bug - qu guard bypass

Root cause: TypingBuffer.keyCode(at:) returns processedData base key

(KEYU) instead of raw keyCode (KEYW) after w→ư standalone conversion.

This caused handleVowelKey's 'qu' guard to wrongly match 'qư' as 'qu',

bypassing checkForStandaloneChar undo logic entirely.

Fix:

  • VNEngine.swift: Add STANDALONE_MASK check to 'qu' guard in handleVowelKey
  • VNEngine.swift: Check processedData bitmask in checkForStandaloneChar
  • VNEngineEnglishDetection.swift: Add 'qw' to consonantWClusters
  • VNEngineTests.swift: Add 6 standalone undo tests (ww, qww, hww, bww, khww, caps)

All tests pass.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
